news.t: Roundhill Announces Strategy, Name, & Ticker Changes for WPAY
Top Win announces strategic investments, ticker symbol change
Top Win International Ltd trading resumes
Top Win International Ltd trading halted, volatility trading pause
Top Win International prepares to partner with Sora Ventures powerhouse

holdings.infoBox: TOPW is an equity ETF with a total of 11 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Roundhill Top WeeklyPay ETF (TOPW) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks an index of 25 WeeklyPay single-stock ETFs offered by Roundhill. The fund selects and weights constituents by market cap and aims for weekly distribution payments based on its constituents' distributions. TOPW was launched on Sep 4, 2025 and is issued by Roundhill.
